description: Published shape of an execution-ready GitHub issue body. Enforced at issue-lint time; GitHub-authored text is execution input, not supervisor policy.

additiveChanges: Adding new optional sections or new enum values is additive and backward-compatible.
breakingChanges: Removing or renaming a required section, or changing required metadata semantics, is a breaking change.
compatibilityPolicy.stabilityLimit: This contract does not claim runtime enforcement beyond the existing issue-lint runtime.
